name: BSC Ontology (Balanced Scorecard & Strategy Maps)
description: Balanced Scorecard, Strategy Maps, Stakeholder Alignment, Value Chain Activities, and Lifecycle Stage Analysis. Bridges VSOM strategy to KPI/RRR measurement via four BSC perspectives (Financial, Customer, Internal Process, Learning & Growth). Part of VE-Series VSOM-SA sub-series.

components.BalancedScorecard: Container for four BSC perspectives with strategic alignment
components.BSCPerspective: One of four perspectives: Financial, Customer, Internal Process, Learning & Growth
components.BSCObjective: Strategic objective within a BSC perspective
components.BSCMeasure: Measurable KPI linked to a BSC objective
components.StrategyMap: Visual cause-and-effect DAG linking objectives across perspectives
components.CausalLink: Directed edge in strategy map representing cause-effect hypothesis
components.StakeholderAlignment: Stakeholder analysis linked to BSC and VSOM
components.StrategicValueChain: Porter-style value chain mapped to BSC Internal Process perspective
components.ValueChainActivity: Individual activity in strategic value chain
components.LifecycleStageAnalysis: Organisation/product lifecycle stage analysis with BSC implications

crossOntology.name: measureTrackedByKPI
crossOntology.purpose: BSC measures map to KPI metrics

versionHistory.changes: Initial release — BSC, Strategy Maps, Stakeholder Alignment, Value Chain, Lifecycle

notes: Layer 3 (Organisation) of VSOM Strategy Analysis. BSC bridges VSOM strategy to KPI/RRR measurement. BSCPerspective._crossOntologyAlignment maps perspectiveType to kpi:KPI.category and rrr:ExecutiveRole.bscPerspective.
